Tenant Report

This Tenant Assessment Report provides an executive overview of your organization’s Microsoft 365 environment, focusing on overall configuration, security posture, and alignment with recommended best practices.

The purpose of this report is to evaluate key foundational elements of your tenant, including identity security (such as multi-factor authentication), licensing posture, and overall tenant configuration alignment. These core components are critical to ensuring a secure, well-managed, and cost-effective Microsoft 365 environment.

The assessment highlights areas where your tenant is properly configured, as well as gaps that may introduce security risks, operational inefficiencies, or underutilized investments. Particular attention is given to identity protection through MFA, appropriate license assignment and utilization, and adherence to baseline configuration standards that support both security and productivity.

The findings and recommendations in this report are designed to provide leadership and IT stakeholders with clear, actionable insights to strengthen security, optimize licensing, and improve overall tenant governance. By addressing these areas, your organization can ensure a more secure, efficient, and strategically aligned Microsoft 365 environment.
